environmentVariables.//: ASPIRE_TERMINAL_HOST_PATH + INVOCATION_ARGS resolve the 13.5-preview WithTerminal API's terminal-host binary when launching via F5 / dotnet run. When you launch via `aspire run` the CLI sets these automatically. The path points at the bundled aspire-managed.exe inside the locally-installed aspire CLI tool (which is the same SDK preview as the AppHost SDK).
